descriptions.text:
Pokémon: Fool's Gold is a ROM hack of Pokémon Crystal.
In this game, all of the Pokémon from Gold and Silver (plus a few more) have been reworked in the same vein as regional variants with new types and stats. In addition, there have been a few visual tweaks, and a few new places to explore, too!
A familiar journey through Johto, where everything is a little different!
